caption: The video shows a group of armed individuals in military attire on a dirt road in a rural, wooded area. Several people are wearing brown and olive-drab uniforms, helmets, and tactical vests. Some have blue bands wrapped around their arms. In the foreground and middle ground, these individuals stand and move around each other; one person holds a rifle vertically. To the left, another individual walks away from the camera. In the background, other figures are visible further down the road. Throughout the sequence, the camera remains relatively stationary, capturing the slight movements of the group. The text "Hero Ukraine" is overlaid in white across the center of the scene, and a red and white "13" logo appears in the top right corner. The lighting is bright, casting distinct shadows on the ground.
